name: Black Eyed Peas-Mexican Style
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound Salt pork, cut into slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a slow cooker pot, combine the dried black-eyed peas and water.
2. Soak the peas overnight.
3. Cook the soaked beans in water on high heat for 2 1/2 hours or until tender, but not mushy.
4. Turn the heat to low. Stir in the salt pork, garlic, salt, pepper, and oregano.
5. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
6. Drain the peas before serving.
